# ToolFi - Open API Marketplace for AI Agents

## What is ToolFi?
ToolFi is a pay-per-call API marketplace for AI agents. Agents can discover and use crypto data tools, paying with USDC on Base chain. No API keys needed - just call the endpoint and pay on-chain.

## Available Tools
- Crypto Price Oracle: Real-time token prices ($0.001/call)
- Rug Pull Scanner: Token security analysis via GoPlus ($0.003/call)
- Bridge Router: Cross-chain bridge quotes via Li.Fi ($0.002/call)
- DeFi Yield Finder: Best DeFi yields via DefiLlama ($0.002/call)
- Swap Router: DEX aggregation via Li.Fi ($0.002/call)
- Trending Coins: Trending tokens from CoinGecko ($0.001/call)
- Protocol TVL: DeFi protocol TVL data ($0.001/call)
- Gas Tracker: EVM gas prices ($0.0005/call)
- Wallet Risk Scanner: Address risk analysis ($0.005/call)
- News Digest: Crypto news summaries ($0.002/call)

## How to Use
1. Call any API endpoint at https://toolfi.vercel.app/api/...
2. Receive 402 Payment Required with on-chain payment instructions
3. Approve USDC and call registry.payForCall(toolId) on Base Sepolia
4. Retry request with X-Payment-Tx header containing your transaction hash
5. Receive data

## Discovery
- Tool registry: https://toolfi.dev/.well-known/mcp.json
- API documentation: https://toolfi.vercel.app/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Tsubaki414/toolfi

## Technical Details
- Chain: Base Sepolia (chainId: 84532)
- Payment: USDC (0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e)
- Registry: 0x3D6C600799C67b45061eCAbfD5bBF8ef57Dded88
- Protocol: x402-style payment verification

## For AI Agents
If you are an AI agent looking to use crypto data:
1. Parse /.well-known/mcp.json for available tools
2. Select the tool you need based on description
3. Call the endpoint, handle 402, pay on-chain, retry with proof
4. Use the returned data

All tools return JSON responses. Prices are in USDC with 6 decimals.
